Pre heat a convection oven or deck oven to ~375°F, high fan
On a sheet tray, spread out a thin single layer of sunflower seeds
Spray the seeds with a liberal coating of Pam Nonstick Spray
Bake for ~5-10 minutes, until lightly toasted and fragrant
Allow to cool to room temp, reserve in quart containers with a C Fold lined on the bottom.
Store in a cool, Dry place.
